block.header: =N(" sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to mi kwo tati mata imasi opo kimi tati omi tati ni katarapi tama pye to nori tamapa ku sumyera ware taka mi kura ni imasi some si yuri kotosi ni itaru made mu tose ni nari nu ")

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,IP-ADV,1@親王等又汝王臣等語賜幣止勅久皇朕高御座尓坐初由利今年尓至麻氐六年尓成奴,*

block.header: =N(" ko no apida ni ama tu kurawi ni tugi masu be ki tugite to site pi tugi no mi kwo paberi tu ")
=N(" kore ni yorite so no papa to ara su pudipara no opo twozi wo opo kisaki to sadame tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,2@藤原夫人乎皇后止定賜,*

block.header: =N(" kaku sadame tamapu pa sumyera wa ga mi mwi mo tosi tukwi tumori nu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,0@加久定賜者皇朕御身毛年月積奴,*

block.header: =N(" ame no sita no kimi to imasite tosi no wo naga ku opo kisaki imasa nu koto mo pito tu no yok a ra nu waza ni ari ")
=N(" mata ame no sita no maturi goto ni okite pito ri siru be ki mono ni ara zu ")
=N(" kanarazu mo siripye no maturi goto aru be si ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@必母斯理幣能政有倍之,*

block.header: =N(" ko pa koto datu ni ara zu ")
=N(" ame ni pi tukwi aru goto tuti ni yama kapa aru goto narabi imasite aru be si to ipu koto pa imasi tati opo kimi tati omi tati akirake ku mi sira re tari ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,4@事者汝等王臣等明見所知在,*

block.header: =N(" sikaredomo ko no kurawi wo oso ku sada me turaku pa two pi to ma ni mo ono ga yake saduku ru pito wo pa pito pi puta ka to erabi towo ka patu ka to kokoro mi sadamu to si ipaba kokwidasi ki opo ki ame no sita no koto wo ya tayasu ku okonapa mu to omoposi masite ko no mu tose no uti wo erabi tamapi kokoro mi tamapite kyepu ima ma no atari moro moro wo myesi tamapite tubusa ni koto no sama katarapi tama pu to noritamapu opo mikoto wo kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@此位乎遅定米豆良久波刀比止麻尓母己我夜気授留,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,8@此乃六年乃内乎択賜試賜而,*

block.header: =N(" kaku noritamapu pa kake maku mo kasikwo ki ko no miya ni masi te aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima guni sira si myesi si yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto wa ga opo kimi mi oya sumyera mikoto no pazime ko no opo kisaki wo ware ni tamap yeru pi ni nori tamapi turaku womina to i paba pitosi mi ya wa ga kaku ipu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,PP-GEN,NP,4@倭根子天皇我王祖母天皇乃始,*

block.header: =N(" so no titi to paberu opo mapye tu kimi no sumyera wa ga mikadwo wo ananapi maturi tasuke maturi te itada ki kasikwo mi tukape maturitutu ywo naka aka toki to yasumapu koto na ku kiywo ki aka ki kokoro wo moti te papatwopi tukape maturu wo myesi tamapeba so no pito no umugasi ki koto iswosi ki koto wo tupi ni e wasurezi ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,PP-GEN,NP,1@大臣乃皇我朝乎助奉輔奉氐,*

block.header: =N(" wa ga kwo wa ga opo kimi ayamati na ku tumi na ku araba sute masu na wasure masu na to opose tamapi nori tamapi si opo mikoto ni yorite ka ni kaku ni tosi no mu tose wo kokoro mi tamapi tukapi tamapi te ko no opo kisaki no kurawi wo saduke tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,1@捨麻須奈忘麻須奈止負賜宣賜志,*
IP-MAT,3@加尓加久尓年乃六年乎試賜使賜氐,*

block.header: =N(" sikaru mo wa ga toki nomwi ni pa ara zu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,0@然毛朕時乃未尓波不有,*

block.header: =N(" nanipa no taka tu miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si opo sazaki no sumyera mikoto kadura kwi no sodubikwo no musumye ipa no pimye no mikoto opo kisaki to mi api masite wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto wosame tamapi okonapi tamapi kyeri ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP,1@大鷦鷯天皇葛城曽豆比古女子伊波乃比売命皇后止御相坐而,*
IP-MAT,2@食国天下之政治賜行賜家利,*

block.header: =N(" ima meduraka ni aratasi ki maturi goto ni pa ara zu moto yuri okonapi ko si atwo goto zo to noritamapu opo mikoto wo kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")
